decoration: minimal — one or two subtle shapes
hero_layout: card-style — hero content inside a floating card/panel
hero_headline_scale: subtle — standard h1 size, nothing crazy
hero_height: full viewport — 100vh with scroll cue below
scroll_animation: playful — elements slide/bounce in from different directions
cursor_effect: magnetic effect — buttons slightly attract cursor on hover
contact_style: playful — with a friendly CTA headline
bonus_quirk: footer includes a tiny randomly chosen emoji that changes daily
